2606.28039.title: Mind the Gap: Quantifying the Domain Gap in Cross-Sensor Diffusion Super-Resolution
2606.28039.paper_summary: Demand for high-resolution satellite imagery has increased interest in super-resolution (SR) to bridge the spatial resolution gap between freely available missions such as Sentinel-2 and commercial systems like PlanetScope. Because no sensor provides true paired low- and high-resolution observations, SR models are usually trained on synthetically degraded data, creating a domain gap on real cross-sensor imagery. In this work, we provide the first systematic study of how this synthetic-to-real mismatch affects the performance of modern diffusion-based SR models. Using a large, geometrically and temporally aligned dataset of Sentinel-2 and PlanetScope imagery, we evaluate five state-of-the-art diffusion architectures under controlled experimental settings. We also introduce LPIPS-Sat, a domain-adapted perceptual metric based on Sentinel-2 self-supervised features. Our results show two persistent challenges: synthetically trained models degrade sharply on real pairs, while models trained on real cross-sensor data exhibit optimisation difficulties and struggle to adapt to the physical and radiometric diversity. These findings highlight a key limitation of current SR and motivate methods that disentangle super-resolution from domain adaptation.
2606.28039.paper_summary_zh: 對高解析度衛星影像的需求增加了對超解析度（SR）的興趣，以彌補自由可用的任務（如Sentinel-2）與商業系統（如PlanetScope）之間的空間解析度差距。由於沒有傳感器提供真實的低解析度和高解析度觀測值，SR模型通常是在合成降級數據上訓練的，這在真實的跨傳感器影像上創造了領域差距。在這項工作中，我們提供了首個系統性研究，探討這種合成與真實不匹配如何影響現代基於擴散的SR模型的性能。利用一個大型的幾何和時間上對齊的Sentinel-2和PlanetScope影像數據集，我們在受控實驗條件下評估了五種最先進的擴散架構。我們還引入了LPIPS-Sat，這是一種基於Sentinel-2自監督特徵的領域適應感知度量。我們的結果顯示了兩個持續的挑戰：合成訓練的模型在真實配對上急劇降級，而在真實跨傳感器數據上訓練的模型則出現優化困難，並且難以適應物理和輻射的多樣性。這些發現突顯了當前SR的一個關鍵限制，並激發了將超解析度與領域適應分開的方法。
2606.28039.author: Dawid Kopeć et.al.
2606.28039.authors: Dawid Kopeć, Katarzyna Jabłońska, Wojciech Kozłowski, Maciej Zięba
